content.en:
Speedcubing

魔方速拧

颜瑞民

Ruimin Yan (颜瑞民)

About the Author

Ruimin Yan (born 2 Mar 1995, WCAID: 2017YANR02), , from Wenzhou, Zhejiang, is Provincial-Level Merit Student in Yunnan, graduated from Nankai University as a bachelor with double major – Physics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, is studying in George Washington University for a master of Mathematics, has won the first prize of the National High School Mathematics League twice. He is the operating officer of WeChat official account Cube_Root and website http://cuberoot.me, and devotes to design speedcubing tutorials and manage algorithm database, published the book Super Brain Thinking: Rubik's Cube Game Skills from Getting Started to Mastering.

I am currently making a resource platform on Rubik's Cube methods and the algorithm database which provides speedcubers the best speed-optimal algorithms.

作者简介

颜瑞民 (生于1995年3月2日, WCAID: 2017YANR02), 浙江温州人, 云南省级三好学生, 南开大学物理和数学双学士，现留美攻读数学硕士学位. 曾两次获得全国高中数学联赛一等奖. 微信公众号“魔方根” (Cube_Root) 和网站http://cuberoot.me的运营人，致力于魔方速拧教程设计和公式库管理，著有《超脑思维：魔方游戏技巧从入门到精通》一书.

Nickname昵称:

Rayminx

YAN3

Teraminx (Yeraminx)

CubeRoot founded by Ruimin Yan, China, is a Rubik's Cube resource platform that designs speedcubing tutorials and algorithm database.

Published Book 出版图书

《超脑思维：魔方游戏技巧从入门到精通》

Super Brain Thinking: Rubik's Cube Game Skills from Getting Started to Mastering

Poster海报
